name: dev-tools-skills
description: All-in-one development toolkit: universal project init (dt:init), study assistant (dt:study), git push (dt:push), plugin management (dt:update-remote-plugins), code annotation (dt:code-note), Cloudflare tunnel (dt:to-public-cloudflare), task-scoped plan docs (dt:plan-doc), project-local skill lifecycle management (dt:project-skills), Android tools (adt:*), and Flutter tools (fdt:*).
